subcodes.first_line: I bear witness, O my God, to Thy unity, and acknowledge Thy singleness. Verily, Thou art God; there is none other God but Thee. From time immemorial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی بوحدانیتک و اعترف بفردانیتک انک انت الله لا اله الا انت لم تزل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @transcendence; unknowability of God
